description: LoopNet commercial real estate marketplace — search inventory and pull listing detail from server-rendered pages with embedded schema.org JSON-LD.

tools.name: inventory_listings
tools.description: Search LoopNet listings for a location, property type, and sale-or-lease. Returns a server-rendered results page carrying a schema.org CollectionPage JSON-LD block with one RealEstateListing per result. Required: property_type, location, listing_type.

params.name: property_type
params.description: Property type slug (office-buildings, retail, industrial-properties, multifamily, land, hospitality, health-care, special-purpose, or commercial-real-estate for all).

params.name: location
params.description: Location slug (city-state like 'los-angeles-ca', a state like 'ma', or a 5-digit zip).

tools.name: property_detail
tools.description: Fetch one LoopNet listing's detail page. The page carries a schema.org RealEstateListing/Product JSON-LD block plus a property-facts table (price, cap rate, building class, zoning, year built, parcel numbers, tax assessments). Required: id. Returns the html.

params.name: id
params.description: LoopNet listing id (the numeric id at the end of a /Listing/ URL, e.g. 38523625).
